content: Create national_team_detector.py (FIFA list + ES↔EN aliases + comp keywords)
Wire detector into thestatsapi_normalizer for is_national_team auto-detection
Update aggregator dedupe to use country aliases (Belgica↔Belgium)
Extend ingest_live allowlist for TheStatsAPI nat-team fixtures (synthetic Tier-2)
Add TheStatsAPI stats normalizer (xG/shots/possession → API-Sports shape)
Wire stats fetch+merge in _enrich_football for nat-team fixtures missing stats
Add 'Fuentes: API-Sports + TheStatsAPI' badge in MatchCard
Tests: nat-team detection, Belgica/Croacia case, stats merge, dedupe with aliases
Run full pytest suite (target 441+ tests pass)
